name: COMPLIANCE-URLS: when paywalled:true, document_url (citation pointer) and attribution_note are required (cannot fetch full text but can cite)
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf -- "- id: iso-27001-a14
  name: ISO 27001
  url: https://iso.org/27001
  authoritative_publisher: ISO
  jurisdiction: ISO
  applicable_to: [security]
  identifier_scheme: A.<n>
  why_authoritative: |
    a
    b
    c
  fetch_frequency: monthly
  legal_review_required: true
  paywalled: true
" > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-compliance-urls.sh" "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml"
